name: Potato Nachos
recipeIngredient: Fresh Idaho potato, cut into 1/4-inch slices
Green chilies (2 tablespoons), chopped and drained
Chopped green onion or sliced pitted ripe olives (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a single layer in a microwave-safe pie plate or shallow baking dish.
2. Lightly sprinkle the potatoes with salt.
3. Brush half of the taco sauce over the potatoes.
4. Cover the dish loosely with plastic wrap and cook on High for 4 to 5 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender. Rotate the dish once during cooking.
5. Brush the remaining taco sauce over the potatoes.
6. Sprinkle with green onion and cheese (if using).
7. Re-cover the dish and cook on High for 1/2 to 1 minute, or until the cheese is melted.
8. Serve 2 snack servings.
